cases.case_ref: PSERC tariff order, Power Division (Malwa Power / 8MW biomass plant)
cases.forum: High Court of Punjab & Haryana (appeal from PSERC order)
cases.parties: DEE Development Engineers (Power Division / Malwa Power Private Limited) vs. PSERC / PSPCL
cases.note: PSERC revised the Power Division's tariff downward to INR5.877/unit; the company appealed to the High Court of Punjab & Haryana, which stayed the PSERC order on 23 Oct 2025. Pending final disposal, the company continues billing PSPCL at the prior tariff of INR7.47/unit, and any tariff-differential recovery PSPCL might claim remains withheld. Management has also flagged a possible future appeal to APTEL (Appellate Tribunal for Electricity) seeking a tariff increase per CERC regulations. This matches the PSERC/tariff commentary in the company's Q3 FY26 concall (management referenced a 'final hearing with the PSERC' and a per-unit production cost around Rs.5.8).
cases.source: PSERC order dated 20 Aug 2025 (tariff revised to INR5.877/unit); High Court stay order dated 23 Oct 2025
